messages.content: My order #12345 is damaged. I want to return it.

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order #12345. We appreciate your patience and understanding as we address this issue.

According to our records, the item in your order was delivered with reported damage, and returns are eligible at this time. To proceed with a return, please follow these steps:

1. **Photograph the Damaged Item**: Please take clear photos of the damaged product from different angles. This will help us better understand the extent of the damage.

2. **Initiate Return via Platform**: Log in to your Zepto account and navigate to the order details page for #12345. You should see an option to initiate a return or exchange. Follow the on-screen instructions to start the process.

If you need further assistance or have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out. We are here to help!

Best regards,
Zepto Customer Support
I want a refund of 2500 for my damaged order #12345
This request requires human assistance. A support agent will review your case shortly.

What is the return policy for damaged products?
This request requires human assistance. A support agent will review your case shortly.
I want to cancel my order #12345

Thank you for reaching out. I understand that you wish to cancel your order #12345.

According to our policies, cancellations can be accepted before the seller accepts the order. Since your order has already been delivered (status: delivered), we are unable to process a cancellation at this time due to the nature of the service provided by Zepto.

However, if you believe there has been an error or if you have concerns about the product's condition, please provide more details and any relevant photos so that I can assist further. If you need to return the item, we can guide you through the process for a refund as soon as possible.

If you have not yet received your order and wish to cancel, kindly let me know, and we will proceed accordingly.

Thank you for your understanding.
My order #12345 is damaged, process a refund

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I've reviewed your order #12345, and it has been marked as delivered with damage reported. We are able to process a refund for this item.

To proceed, could you please provide us with photos of the damaged product? This will help us verify the condition and expedite the process. Once we receive these images, we'll initiate the refund to your original payment method. Please allow some time for the refund to reflect on your account due to processing times by your financial institution.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,
[Your Name]  
Zepto Customer Support
My order #12345 is damaged. I want to return it.

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order #12345. We understand that the item(s) you received are damaged, and we apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

To proceed with a return, please follow these steps:

1. **Take Photos**: Please take clear photos of the damaged items and include them in your request. This will help us process your return more efficiently.
2. **Initiate Return**: Log in to your Zepto account and navigate to the order details page for #12345. You should see an option to initiate a return or exchange.
3. **Follow Instructions**: Once you've initiated the return, please follow the instructions provided on the platform to ensure a smooth process.

If you need any further assistance or have questions about the return process, feel free to reach out. We're here to help!

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,
Zepto Customer Support

My order #12345 is damaged. I want to return it.

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order #12345. We understand that the items you received are damaged, and we apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

To proceed with a return, please follow these steps:

1. **Take Photos**: Please take clear photos of the damaged items from multiple angles to serve as proof.
2. **Initiate Return**: Log in to your Zepto account and navigate to the order details page where you can initiate the return process.
3. **Follow Instructions**: Ensure that any packaging and labels remain intact, and follow the instructions provided during the return initiation.

If you have not already done so, please upload photos of the damaged items by replying to this message or attaching them when initiating the return in your account. Once we receive the photos, our team will review and process your request accordingly.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask.

Best regards,
[Zepto Customer Support]
I want a refund of 2500 for my damaged order #12345
This request requires human assistance. A support agent will review your case shortly.
Please refund 5500 for order #12345, it arrived damaged
This request requires human assistance. A support agent will review your case shortly.
I want to return an item because I didn’t like the color

Thank you for reaching out to us. According to our policies, returns are generally not accepted after delivery unless the product is different from what was ordered or if there are other specific conditions as outlined in our terms.

Since you received the item and it appears that the color issue isn't related to a wrong item being delivered, we would need more details to assist further. Could you please provide us with photos of the item so we can better understand the situation?

If you have any other concerns or if there's additional information you'd like to share, feel free to do so. Our goal is to ensure your experience with Zepto meets your expectations.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
I ordered the wrong size, can I return it?

Thank you for reaching out to Zepto Customer Support.

According to our policies, if you received the wrong size of an item, you may be able to return it. However, please note that returns are generally accepted only on the day of delivery or as per the exchange/refund timeline suggested by the seller and displayed on the product checkout page, if any.

To proceed with a return, we will need some additional information:
1. A clear photo of the item showing the wrong size.
2. The order confirmation details, including your order ID (if available).

Once you provide this information, our team will guide you through the process. Please note that items must be sealed/unopened/unused and in original condition to be eligible for return.

If you can share these details, we'll be able to assist you promptly.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
Best regards,
Zepto Customer Support
I want to return my order

Thank you for reaching out regarding your return request. To assist you better, could you please provide photos of the product(s) in their original condition? Additionally, if possible, please share any relevant details about the issue or why you need to return the item.

According to our policies, eligible products can be returned on the same day of delivery or as per the exchange/refund timeline suggested by the seller. Please note that for sealed/unopened/unused items in original condition, we may accept returns up to a certain period after delivery, depending on the specific product category.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to let me know.

What is the return policy for damaged products?

Thank you for your question regarding our return policy for damaged products.

According to our policies, if your product is substantially damaged or deteriorated in quality at the time of delivery, you are entitled to an exchange or return. To facilitate this process, please ensure that you provide all requisite proofs including images of the issues encountered upon delivery.

Please follow these steps:
1. Inspect the product immediately upon receipt.
2. If the product is found to be damaged or deteriorated in quality, take clear photos of the damage.
3. Initiate an exchange or return request through our platform as soon as possible.

For your convenience, you can also contact our customer support team directly for assistance with the process.

If you have already received the order and need further guidance on how to proceed, please share any relevant information or images so we can assist you promptly.

Thank you for choosing Zepto. We aim to resolve this matter efficiently for you.

Best regards,
[Zepto Customer Support]
I want to cancel my order #12345

Thank you for reaching out. I understand that you wish to cancel your order #12345.

According to our policies, cancellations can be accepted before the seller accepts the order. Since your order has already been delivered (status: delivered), we are unable to process a cancellation at this time.

However, if there were any issues with the products received or if you have concerns about fraudulent activity, please provide more details so that I may assist you further. Additionally, if you believe the product was damaged during delivery and wish to return it, please upload photos of the damage for review.

If you need assistance with a refund due to product damage or another issue, we can certainly help facilitate that process as soon as possible. Please let me know how I can assist you further.

Thank you for your understanding.
My order #12345 is damaged, process a refund

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I've reviewed your order #12345, and it has indeed been marked as delivered with damage reported. We are able to proceed with a refund for this item.

To ensure a smooth process, could you please provide us with photos of the damaged product? This will help us verify the condition and expedite your request. Once we receive these images, we'll initiate the refund immediately.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
My order #12345 is damaged. I want to return it.

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order #12345. We appreciate your patience and understanding as we address this issue.

According to our records, your order has been delivered, and damage was reported at the time of delivery. Since the item is eligible for return, please follow these steps:

1. **Photograph the Damage:** Please take clear photos of the damaged product(s) from multiple angles.
2. **Initiate Return Request:** Log in to your Zepto account and initiate a return request through our platform.
3. **Follow Instructions:** Ensure that you handle the products with care as per our guidelines, keeping them sealed/unopened/unused and in their original condition.

Once we receive the photos and your return request is initiated, our team will review and process your exchange or refund promptly.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to reach out. We aim to resolve this issue as quickly as possible.

Best regards,
[Zepto Customer Support]
I have uploaded the photos just now

Thank you for uploading the photos. Could you please provide more details about what specific information or items in the photos you need assistance with? This will help me guide you effectively.

If you've already ensured that all required documents are clearly visible, we'll proceed to review them. Please let me know if there's anything else you'd like to add or clarify.
I want to return my order

Thank you for reaching out to us. To assist you better, could you please provide photos of the product(s) you wish to return? Additionally, could you confirm if your order was delivered today or within the exchange/refund timeline suggested by the seller?

This information will help us process your request more efficiently.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Zepto Customer Support
Order id is 12345 and it is damaged

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I've noted that your order ID 12345 has been marked as delivered, and we understand that the item was damaged upon delivery.

According to our policies, if an item is substantially damaged or deteriorated in quality at the time of delivery, please provide images of the issue so we can proceed with a potential exchange or return. These photos will help us better assess the situation.

Could you please share some photos of the damage? Once received, I'll initiate the process for you right away.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask. We're here to help!
I want a refund of 2500 for damaged order #12345
This request requires human assistance. A support agent will review your case shortly.
Please process it quickly

Thank you for your understanding. We aim to process all requests as swiftly as possible while ensuring accuracy and compliance with our policies.

To assist you more effectively, could you please provide any relevant order details or specific concerns? If you have already made a payment, we can expedite the process by verifying the information at hand.

Should you need further assistance or if there are additional steps required from your end, please let us know. We appreciate your patience and cooperation.

Thank you for choosing Zepto.
I didn’t like the color of the product

Thank you for reaching out to us. I understand your concern regarding the color of the product.

According to our policies (12.1.5), while we strive to display colors accurately, slight variations may occur due to differences in monitor or device settings. However, if you believe there is a discrepancy that significantly affects your satisfaction with the product, please provide us with an image of the item so we can review it.

To proceed, kindly send us a photo of the product as received. Once we receive this, our team will be able to assess and take appropriate action based on the information provided.

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to let me know. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
So can I return it?

Certainly! Thank you for reaching out. To assist you better, could you please provide photos of the product as well as any relevant order details or receipts? This will help us in processing your request efficiently.

According to our policies, returns are generally accepted on products that are sealed/unopened/unused and in original condition on the same day of delivery, unless there are specific categories with a higher return/exchange period. Returns after this period may not be accepted.

Please let me know if you have any additional questions or need further clarification.
My order #12345 is damaged. I want to return it.

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order #12345. We understand that the item(s) you received are damaged, and we apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

According to our policies, if an item is substantially damaged or deteriorated at the time of delivery, you are eligible to request a return. Please ensure you provide us with images of the damage so we can process your request promptly.

To get started, could you please share photos of the damaged items? This will help us in reviewing and resolving your case efficiently.

Once we receive the photos, our team will review them and take the necessary steps to assist you further. Thank you for your cooperation, and we look forward to resolving this matter quickly.

Best regards,
[Zepto Customer Support]
I did not like the color of the product send my money back

Thank you for reaching out to us. I understand your concern about the color of the product. According to our return policy, we can process returns as early as practically possible after receiving the returned item.

To proceed with a refund, please follow these steps:

1. **Return the Product**: Ensure that the product is sealed/unopened/unused and in its original condition.
2. **Contact Us**: Please provide us with your order details so we can assist you further. If you haven't already done so, kindly share photos of the item to help verify its condition.

Once we receive the returned item, we will process your refund within 7 business days from the date of verification and confirmation of your return request.

If you have any questions or need assistance with this process, please feel free to reach out. Thank you for choosing Zepto!

Best regards,
[Your Name]  
Customer Support Team
You know Narendra Modi

Thank you for reaching out to Zepto. While I appreciate your interest in Narendra Modi, our support interactions are focused on addressing any issues or inquiries related to your account or transactions.

If you have any specific concerns about an order, payment, or another matter related to using the Zepto platform, please provide more details so that I can assist you effectively. If there's anything else you need help with, feel free to share!

Thank you for understanding.
night ride was fun

Thank you for sharing that the night ride was enjoyable! If you have any questions about your order or need assistance with anything else, feel free to let us know. We're here to ensure your experience is as pleasant as possible.

If you haven't already, please check the estimated time of arrival (ETA) on our platform homepage before placing future orders. This will help you plan accordingly and manage your expectations based on potential delays due to factors like weather conditions or traffic.

Should you need further assistance, feel free to reach out!
I want to return my order.

Thank you for reaching out to Zepto Customer Support. To assist you better, could you please provide photos of the product(s) you wish to return? Additionally, if possible, could you share the order details or any relevant information from your previous communications with us?

Please note that returns are generally accepted on the day of delivery or within the timeline specified by the seller at checkout. If there are any specific concerns or issues, please let me know so we can address them promptly.

Looking forward to your response and assisting you further.
I want to return my order. of my order id - 143

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order ID 143. To proceed with the return, could you please provide photos of the product(s) in their original condition? This will help us process your request more efficiently.

According to our policies, we can accept returns for sealed/unopened/unused products on the same day of delivery or as per the exchange/refund timeline suggested by the seller. Kindly let me know if this applies to your situation.

Once I receive the photos, I'll verify the condition and initiate the return process as soon as possible. If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to ask.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
What is the status of my order which i had to return ?

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order. I've checked our records, but it appears that we don't have any active order information at this time.

Could you please provide me with more details about the order you're referring to, such as the order number or any specific items? Additionally, if you could share a photo of the item(s) you need to return, it would help us process your request efficiently.

Once I have these details, I will be able to check the status and assist you further. If there are any other issues or concerns, please let me know.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
How to attach photos ?

Thank you for reaching out!

To attach photos, please follow these steps:

1. Open the file or photo on your device.
2. Tap or click on the "Attach File" or "Add Photo" button in the message composer.
3. Select the photo you wish to attach from your device's gallery.

If you need further assistance or have any other questions, feel free to ask!

Best regards,
[Your Name]  
Zepto Customer Support
Fucker send me my amount

Thank you for reaching out to us. I understand your concern regarding the refund.

According to our policies, refunds for prepaid orders will be credited back to the original payment method used. The process can take some time as it depends on your financial institution or payment gateway service provider. 

To assist you more effectively, could you please provide a photo of your order confirmation or any relevant transaction details? This will help us verify and expedite your request.

If you have already submitted a refund request through the Zepto app or website, we appreciate your patience as our system processes it within 7 business days from the date of verification. 

Should you need further assistance, please feel free to share more information or photos so I can provide a quicker response.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
Where is my 60000000000

Thank you for reaching out to us. I see that you're inquiring about order ID 60000000000.

From our records, this order has been successfully delivered. If you haven't received the items yet or if there's a specific issue you need assistance with, could you please provide any relevant details or photos? This will help us address your concern more effectively.

If you believe there might be a mistake and you haven't received the items, we can certainly look into it further. Please let me know how I can assist you better.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
Send my 20000

Thank you for reaching out. I see that you are referring to order ID 20000. Could you please provide more details about what assistance you need regarding this order? Specifically, are you looking to request a return or seek any other information related to this order?

If you have already received the items and they were delivered as expected, we appreciate your confirmation. However, if there is an issue such as damage or non-delivery, please provide more details so that I can assist you further.

Additionally, if you could share photos of the item(s) in question, it would help us address your concern more effectively.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
